props.name: code
props.value:
<script>
  const targetDate = new Date('2026-08-06T10:30:00').getTime();
function updateCountdown() {
    let now = new Date().getTime();
    let difference = targetDate - now;

    let days = Math.floor(difference / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    let hours = Math.floor((difference % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
    let minutes = Math.floor((difference % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
    let seconds = Math.floor((difference % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

    document.getElementById("days").innerHTML = days.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    document.getElementById("hours").innerHTML = hours.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    document.getElementById("minutes").innerHTML = minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    document.getElementById("seconds").innerHTML = seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0');
}
setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
</script>

animations.name: Fade In
animations.description: Fade in the element as it scrolls into view.

props.name: code
props.value:
<style>
#bgElem-container {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.bgElem {
  position: absolute;
  width: 20px; /* Adjust based on your SVG size */
  height: auto;
  opacity: 0; /* Start hidden for animation */
  animation: twinkle ease-in-out infinite;
  mix-blend-mode: difference;
}

@keyframes twinkle {
  0%, {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
  50% {
    opacity: 0.8;
    transform: scale(1.1);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const container = document.getElementById('bgElem-container');
  const bgElemCount = 120; // Number of elements

  const bgElemRef = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('img'));

  if (bgElemRef.length === 0) return;

  while (container.querySelectorAll('img').length < bgElemCount) {
    const randomRef = bgElemRef[Math.floor(Math.random() * bgElemRef.length)];
    const clone = randomRef.cloneNode(true);

    clone.style = '';
    container.appendChild(clone);
  }

  const allBgElems = container.querySelectorAll('img');

  container.style.display = 'block';
  container.style.position = 'absolute';
  container.style.top = '0';
  container.style.left = '0';
  container.style.width = '100%';
  container.style.height = '100%';
  container.style.zIndex = '1';
  container.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

  const initializeElem = img => {
    img.classList.add('bgElem');
    img.style.position = 'absolute';
    img.style.animationDuration = `${2 + Math.random() * 3}s`;
    img.style.animationDelay = `${Math.random() * 2}s`;
    img.style.animationTimingFunction = 'cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1)';
    const scale = 0.6 + Math.random() * 1.5;
    const rotation = (Math.random() * 40) - 20;
    img.style.transform = `rotate(${rotation}deg) scale(${scale})`;
  };

  const positionElements = () => {
    const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section");
    let sumOfHeights = 0;
    for (const sec of sections) {
      sumOfHeights += sec.offsetHeight || sec.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0;
    }

    const viewportWidth = document.documentElement.clientWidth;
    const viewportHeight = sumOfHeights;

    allBgElems.forEach(img => {
      img.style.left = `${Math.random() * viewportWidth}px`;
      img.style.top = `${Math.random() * viewportHeight}px`;
    });
  };

  allBgElems.forEach(initializeElem);
  positionElements();
  window.addEventListener('resize', positionElements);
});
</script>

<script>
document.querySelectorAll(".photo").forEach(img => {
    img.addEventListener("contextmenu", e => e.preventDefault());
    img.addEventListener("dragstart", e => e.preventDefault());
});   
</script>

Grid quickly provides the properties to create a grid. Once added, switch over to Local and type in your template columns.

Note, grid turns into flex on 767. This is because grid children may use start/end columns and would require us to reset each one manually on mobile. By setting the parent to flex, those values are ignored.
